tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.description: Create package.json, tsconfig.json, and project folder structure.

tasks.title: Create .env configuration
tasks.description: Setup 20 environment variables: NODE_ENV, PORT, API_URL, FRONTEND_URL, JWT_SECRET, ... (+15 more)

tasks.title: Configure 10 secrets
tasks.description: User input needed for: JWT_SECRET, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
tasks.user_prompt:
Please provide the following secrets for your project:

**JWT_SECRET**
  Description: Secret key for JWT token signing
  Example: your-super-secret-jwt-key-min-32-chars

**SMTP_USER**
  Description: SMTP username

**SMTP_PASSWORD**
  Description: SMTP password

**S3_ACCESS_KEY**
  Description: AWS S3 access key

**S3_SECRET_KEY**
  Description: AWS S3 secret key

**STRIPE_SECRET_KEY**
  Description: Stripe secret API key

**STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET**
  Description: Stripe webhook signing secret

**TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN**
  Description: Twilio Auth Token

**OPENAI_API_KEY**
  Description: OpenAI API key

**GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET**
  Description: Google OAuth client secret

You can skip optional secrets by leaving them empty.

tasks.title: Configure database connection
tasks.description: Setup DATABASE_URL in .env and run initial Prisma setup.

tasks.title: Create Docker configuration
tasks.description: Generate docker-compose.yml with all required services (database, redis, etc.).

tasks.title: Install dependencies
tasks.description: Run npm install for all required packages.
tasks.success_criteria: node_modules created, no npm install errors

tasks.title: Create Prisma model: auth_credential
tasks.description: Define auth_credential model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.

tasks.title: Define relations for: auth_credential
tasks.description: Set up Prisma relations for auth_credential with other entities.

tasks.title: Run migration for: auth_credential
tasks.description: Execute prisma migrate dev for auth_credential changes.

tasks.description: Define encryption_session model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.

tasks.title: Define relations for: encryption_session
tasks.description: Set up Prisma relations for encryption_session with other entities.

tasks.title: Run migration for: encryption_session
tasks.description: Execute prisma migrate dev for encryption_session changes.

tasks.title: Create Prisma model: user
tasks.description: Define user model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.

tasks.title: Define relations for: user
tasks.description: Set up Prisma relations for user with other entities.

tasks.title: Run migration for: user
tasks.description: Execute prisma migrate dev for user changes.

tasks.title: Create Prisma model: user_device
tasks.description: Define user_device model in prisma/schema.prisma with all required attributes and types.

tasks.title: Define relations for: user_device
tasks.description: Set up Prisma relations for user_device with other entities.

tasks.title: Run migration for: user_device
tasks.description: Execute prisma migrate dev for user_device changes.

tasks.title: Validate Prisma schema
tasks.description: Run prisma validate to check schema integrity.

tasks.title: Checkpoint: Review Schema
tasks.description: User approval required before continuing. Review the schema phase results.
tasks.user_prompt:
Review the generated Prisma schema.

Please verify:
- All entities are correctly defined
- Relations between entities are correct
- Field types and constraints are appropriate
- Indexes are defined where needed

Approve to continue with API generation.

tasks.title: Feature: phone-registrations (3 endpoints: POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'phone-registrations' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 3 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/phone-registrations — Start phone registration
  POST /api/v1/phone-registrations/{registrationId}/verify — Verify phone registration
  POST /api/v1/phone-registrations/{registrationId}/resend-otp — Resend OTP

tasks.title: Feature: auth (6 endpoints: POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'auth' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 6 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/verify — Verify 2FA PIN during authentication
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/registration/options — Get passkey registration options
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/registration/verify — Verify passkey registration
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/authentication/options — Get passkey authentication options
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/authentication/verify — Verify passkey authentication
  POST /api/v1/auth/pin/verify — Verify PIN during two-step verification

tasks.title: Feature: users (11 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'users' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 11 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/2fa — Enable 2FA with 6-digit PIN
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/2fa — Disable 2FA
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/2fa — Get 2FA status
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/passkeys — List user's passkeys
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/passkeys/{credentialId} — Delete a passkey
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Enable additional PIN security
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Update additional PIN
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Disable additional PIN security
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Get PIN security status
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/call-privacy-settings — Get call privacy settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/call-privacy-settings — Update call privacy settings

tasks.title: Feature: biometric (6 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'biometric' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 6 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/biometric/registration-options — Create biometric registration challenge
  POST /api/v1/biometric/credentials — Enroll biometric credential
  GET /api/v1/biometric/credentials — List biometric credentials
  DELETE /api/v1/biometric/credentials/{credentialId} — Revoke biometric credential
  POST /api/v1/biometric/authentication-options — Create biometric authentication challenge
  POST /api/v1/biometric/authenticate — Authenticate with biometrics

tasks.description: Verify API container is healthy via /health endpoint.

tasks.title: Checkpoint: Review Api
tasks.description: User approval required before continuing. Review the api phase results.
tasks.user_prompt:
Review the generated APIs.

Please verify:
- All endpoints are implemented
- Authentication and authorization work
- Input validation is correct
- Error handling is appropriate

Approve to continue with Frontend generation.
